prose:
Method–provenance block
• Property calculated: frontier orbital energies (HOMO, LUMO) and Koopmans‐style HOMO–LUMO gap (eV).
• Electronic structure level: density‐functional theory, B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density‐fitted (RI) — chemkit tier ‘standard’.
• Geometry provenance: single-point on the fixed Cartesian coordinates supplied in /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz (no optimisation performed).
• Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
• Charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell singlet; RHF/RKS).
• Software/backend: PySCF (as wrapped by chemkit frontier-orbitals skill).
• SCF convergence: converged in 8 cycles; gradient/energy thresholds met.
• Warnings: no warnings reported by the engine.
• Live engine log: a real-time progress file was streamed to the working directory (frontier_…​.out) while the calculation ran; full JSON written to /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpi08x8r7t/live.json (see cli_invocation therein).

Key results (gas phase, eV)
• HOMO energy  = −7.6523067 eV  
• LUMO energy  = −1.7826355 eV  
• HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.8696712 eV  ← headline value reported above

No engine warnings were issued; integrity check status: ok (trustworthy = true). All figures come directly from the chemkit frontier-orbitals result listed under headline_field = homo_lumo_gap_eV.
